name: IT Agent
description: Handles IT queries: the available-asset catalogue, the user's own assigned equipment, and (HR Admin) issuing an asset to an employee.

skills.name: List the available-device catalogue
skills.description: Return the catalogue of IT devices AVAILABLE to be issued to an employee, with how many of each are in stock; optionally filter by asset_type (one of: laptop, monitor, phone). Use this for questions about what hardware can be requested or issued: 'what laptops are available', 'show me the monitors', 'what equipment can I get', 'is there a spare phone'. This is the inventory — it is NOT the devices the user currently has (for that use it.get_my_assets), and it is NOT the act of issuing one (for that use it.issue_asset).

skills.name: Get my assigned devices
skills.description: Return the IT devices CURRENTLY ASSIGNED TO the authenticated user — the laptop, phone and/or monitor they personally hold, with each one's status. Use this for first-person questions about the user's own equipment: 'what laptop do I have', 'what's my phone', 'what devices am I issued', 'do I have a monitor', 'show me my equipment'. Parameter-less. This is the user's OWN devices — it is NOT the available-to-issue catalogue (for that use it.list_available_assets).

skills.name: Issue an IT device to an employee
skills.description: Assign (issue) a physical IT device — a laptop, monitor or phone from the asset catalogue — to an employee. HR Admin only; this is a write action. Needs asset_id (the device's catalogue id, e.g. MBP-14-001) and employee_id (the recipient's username). This is about hardware/equipment only — it has nothing to do with leave, time-off, cubicles, or HR records; do not use it for leave-related requests.
